历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 18985 → 19244 → 21094 → 21009 → 17619, showing an overall trend of first decreasing then increasing; in 2025, the ranking moved forward by about 3390 places compared to 2024, with a significant rebound, and the baseline ranking is approximately 17619; the enrollment plan for this university in Hunan Province for Physics Category was 97 in 2021, 95 in 2022, 94 in 2023, 96 in 2024, and 100 in 2025, showing a slight increasing trend; the 2026 plan increases to 107, an expansion of 7% compared to 2025, which is relatively large and helps alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; in the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 67th in 2021 → 60th in 2024 → 67th in 2025 → 73rd in 2026, with slight fluctuations in recent years but overall stable at the upper-middle level; the university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps; its popularity on Douyin platform is average, not entering the top 100 overall, with low short video exposure, and no significant signal of increased application attention; the university is known for its petroleum and petrochemical characteristics, with petroleum and natural gas engineering, geological resources and geological engineering as traditional advantageous disciplines; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation data, the university did not.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,000 in 2025, and the expansion of the examinee scale intensifies competition; the university is located in Qingdao, Shandong, and recruits from outside the province in Hunan, with no local student preference; in recent years, the enrollment plan has no local proportion data, and the influence of regional preference factors is limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant forward shift trend of the 2025 ranking, the mitigating effect of the 7% expansion in 2026, and the intensified competition due to the 8.4% increase in Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move backward compared to the 2025 baseline; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 18559, with a range of 18059–19059.
